T^T. ^F. i^fta t w , (iv) ST. f^T«TT3 1 w , xllcf^l, (v) aft f ^ w r a , (vi) aftrat ^gw oipmt, (vii) ST. ^TT W l t ^ H (^T.^ft.^t."^?., W\^K), (viii) ST. *£$.<£ # ^ T t W , (ix) ^gaft PHdlcft ^F^JS, (x) l a f t ^ n f ^ i i " ; (iv) ^ s ("Tf) 3 t w m r U H wnsff am ^rfgfeqf ^ •?«TFT "CR t^RT%T%tT 9FT w r n r am yfar«<wi T*at "(i) aR^Tra^r •g^T, (ii) 3TOH, (iii) ^ w j - e b ^ V , (iv) sHIUsk, (v) 4>Hk+, (vi) TR^"5r^T, (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] (vii) "3FRF5, (viii) TF5TWFT, (ix) clPHcHI^, (x) ^ R yfc\ I" I [•q^T.U 6-1 /2006 WQ ^fa-I ] TJ;. •%. %rnmQ?R H^irH^i* (^PT wNf) PiUMUl ; T^STf^ERT, *!Rcf'^TR^^'5BT.3?r.l093(37) (TRte 22 [UdH<, 2003 SKI 3R#M ^ t ^f «ft ^K d<W|^ "*R3fl. 1249(3?) Wt^T 8 W^R, 2004,^.31!. 1324(3T) <TKte 1 fef*n:, 2004, ^T.3TT. 802(3T), cTKfta 16 "^, 2007 3?K ^T.3TT. 483(31) cfRftsT 25 ^•PTSRt, 2010 IRT I R f c ^ TTf *TTI MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th September 2010 S.O. 2180(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 5 A of the Wild Life (Protection) Act, 1972 (53 of 1972) read with sub -rule (4) of rule 3 of the National Board for Wild Life Rules, 2003, the Central Government hereby makes the following further amendments in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S.O. 1093 (E) dated 22nd September, 2003, namely :— (i) In the said notification, in clause (c), for serial numbers (i), (ii) and (iii) and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall respectively be substituted, namely :— "(i) Shrimati Chandresh Kumari, Lok Sabha, (ii) Shri Dushyant Singh, Lok Sabha, (iii) Shri Karan Singh, Rajya Sabha."; (ii) In clause (e), for the existing serial numbers and entries, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely :— "(i) Bombay Natural History Society (BNHS), Mumbai, (ii) Aranyak, Guwahati (iii) Satpuda Foundation, Amravati, (iv) Nature Conservation Foundation, Mysore, (v) Wildlife Society of Orissa, Bhubaneshwar."; (iii) In clause (f), for the existing serial numbers and entries, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely :— "(i) ShriValmikThapar, (ii) Shri Brijendra Singh, (iii) Dr. M.K. Ranjitsinh, (iv) Dr. Divyabhanusinh Chavda, (v) Shri Bittu Sehgal, (vi) Smt. Sugathakumary, (vii) Dr. Uma Ramakrishnan (NCBS, Bangalore), (viii) Dr. A.J.T. Johnsingh, (ix) Ms. Mitali Kakkar, (x) Ms.PremaBindra."; (iv) in clause (v), for the existing serial numbers and entries, the following serial numbers and entries shall be substituted, namely :— "(i) Arunachal Pradesh, (ii) Assam, (iii) Jarnmu and Kashmir, (iv) Jharkhand, (v) Karnataka, (vi) Madhya Pradesh, (vii) Maharashtra, (viii) Rajasthan, (ix) Tamil Nadu, (x) Uttar Pradesh.". [F. No. 6-1/2006 WL-I] A. K. SRIVASTAVA, Inspector General of Forests (WL) Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary vide number S.O. 1093(E), dated the 22nd September, 2003 and subsequently amended vide S.O. 1249 (E), dated the 8th November, 2004; S.O. 1324 (E), dated the 1st December, 2004; S.O. 802(E), dated the 16th May, 2007 and S.O. 483(E), dated the 25th February, 2010. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
